title: Mob/Monster-army battle
body:
## Mobarmy Battle by Pious880
The idea is from a german youtuber named BastiGHG                                            
(https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a9Ef6C97JU8&list=PLffX9yMQbaQjuZPtBCCv-NAX3ZlK1RYi0&index=9). 

As he didnt give a download for the game, i tried to make it myself.

## How the game works:
- You can play with up to 4 teams. 
- Configure the time you want to have for the preparation.
- After the time is up, all teams can configure in which wave their killed mobs should spawn.
- Then the teams will be fighting agains each others mobs.
- The winner is who kills all waves first.


Feel free to make a video or stream about this mod.
Join the discord if you found any bugs or have suggestions! (ENG or GER) 

Have Fun :D
